description_long: This house features a rectangular floor plan with a flat roof and partially open walls, revealing a detailed interior layout. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible furniture such as tables, chairs, shelves, and a prominent central archway. Windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically along the exterior walls, and there are two main doors, one at the front and one at the rear. The exterior walls are plain, with minimal decorative elements, and the overall design is utilitarian. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or plaster, with some wooden and metal interior furnishings. The open design allows for clear visibility of the internal arrangement and spatial divisions.
description: A rectangular, flat-roofed house with open walls, visible interior rooms, and sparse, utilitarian exterior features. Asymmetrical windows and simple doors define its practical urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, central archway, and a clear look into the main living area with visible furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlights a plain wall with two crosses, a side door, and a glimpse of interior furnishings and windows.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a large cylindrical object, a back door, and more windows, with interior rooms and furniture visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays another main door, several windows, and a clear view of the internal room divisions and furnishings.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch or decorative elements, directly accessible from the exterior
